title: Grafana Plugin Tip
summary: Have Grafana deployed? Going crazy trying to figure out why your apps and extensions aren't working? It's an easy fix. Under the [security] section, add angular_support_enabled = true . Now for the longer explanation. I was trying to integrate the Zabbix Grafana app . For the instructions, I had to go to the "config" tab of the plugin. Issue was, nothing wa…
content:
Have Grafana deployed? Going crazy trying to figure out why your apps and extensions aren't working? It's an easy fix. Under the [security] section, add angular_support_enabled = true.

Now for the longer explanation. I was trying to integrate the Zabbix Grafana app. For the instructions, I had to go to the "config" tab of the plugin. Issue was, nothing was there. The config tab was missing. Unfortunate.

Seems like other plugins have this issue too, like the Cloudflare Zabbix app. This issue was caused by Grafana phasing out Angular plugin support. By Grafana 10, Angular plugins will no longer be supported and will stop working, even if you have that configuration option set.

Anyway, time to make more fancy graphs :)
